session.user:
Run these commands and report results. Do not fix anything.
1. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/ src/erk/tui/ packages/erk-shared/src/ tests/` 2. `uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/ src/erk/tui/ packages/erk-shared/src/ tests/` 3. `uv run pytest tests/tui/ -x -q`
session.assistant: I'll execute these three commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/ src/erk/tui/ packages/erk-shared/src/ tests/
Run ruff linting checks on specified directories

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/ src/erk/tui/ packages/erk-shared/src/ tests/
Check ruff formatting without modifying files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run TUI tests with exit on first failure and quiet output

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1
==================================== ERRORS ==================================== __________ ERROR collecting tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py __________ ImportError while importing test module '/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py'. Hint: make sure your test modules/packages have valid Python names. Traceback: ../../_temp/uv-python-dir/cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu/lib/python3.13/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py:8: in <module> from erk.tui.data.types import PlanFilters E ImportError: cannot import name 'PlanFilters' from 'erk.tui.data.types' (/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/tui/data/types.py) =========================== short test summary info ============================ ERROR tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant:
## Results
**Command 1 - ruff check:** Passed
> ruff check passed: All checks passed!
**Command 2 - ruff format:** Passed
> ruff format passed: 1394 files already formatted
**Command 3 - pytest tests/tui/:** Failed
